action.reasoning: Observation: Eval consistently fails with evaluator.py looking for '/data/test_labels.txt'. My predict.py runs successfully producing 18000 predictions but finds data at /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test/ (not /data). The WavLM model has dev EER=0.0001. Analysis: The eval container seems to not have /data mounted properly. However, I should keep submitting eval. Meanwhile, I should try to improve the model further. The WavLM model is good but I can try: (1) longer training with codec augmentation, (2) ensemble of XLS-R and WavLM models. Decision: Submit eval with WavLM checkpoint again. Also train WavLM with more codec augmentation epochs to improve generalization to codec-degraded test audio.
